title: coelogyne keithiana
intro: Coelogyne keithiana, also known as the Keith's Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is an epiphytic plant, often found growing on trees, and is prized for its unique, small white flowers with a distinctive shape. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. In traditional medicine, Coelogyne keithiana is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting overall well-being.
